---
name: Feature request
about: A new feature, tool, or data source you would like MCP-Dubai to cover
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## What you want

<!-- A clear description of the feature, tool, or data source. -->

## Why it matters

<!-- Who would use it. What question does it answer. -->

## Proposed location

- [ ] New `data/*` Tier 0 or Tier 1 feature (new API integration)
- [ ] New `biz/*` Tier 2 feature (curated knowledge)
- [ ] New tool inside an existing feature
- [ ] New `agents/*` Tier 4 agent (cross-feature behaviour)

## Source

<!-- If this requires data, where does the data come from? Public API, scraping, curated, or somewhere else? -->

## Has this been verified?

- [ ] I have confirmed the upstream source exists and is accessible
- [ ] I have confirmed the upstream allows reuse (open license, ToS-friendly)
- [ ] I am not sure, please advise
